module.name: ast/parameters
module.description: Higher-level AST parameter helpers for type annotations and special parameter shapes.

scenarios.name: should return the first parameter that is not the this pseudo-parameter
scenarios.given: a function parameter list whose first entry is the TypeScript this pseudo-parameter and a later parameter is a real argument
scenarios.then: returns the first real argument parameter

scenarios.name: should return undefined when no real argument parameter exists
scenarios.given: a function parameter list that only contains the TypeScript this pseudo-parameter

scenarios.name: should return the type node for an object-destructured parameter
scenarios.given: a directly annotated object-pattern parameter or an assignment-pattern parameter whose left side is an annotated object pattern

scenarios.name: should return the type annotation for supported parameter shapes
scenarios.given: a supported parameter shape such as an identifier, assignment pattern, or ts parameter property with a type annotation

scenarios.name: should return the type node for supported parameter shapes
scenarios.given: a supported parameter shape with a type annotation

scenarios.name: should return null when a supported parameter shape has no annotation
scenarios.given: a supported parameter shape without a type annotation

scenarios.name: should return true for the TypeScript this pseudo-parameter
should return false for non-this parameters
scenarios.given: a parameter that is not an Identifier named this
